title: DR Congo government says 200 killed after landslide at rebel-held mine

originalTitle: Map shows how big Iran is compared with the 50 US states
title: Map shows how big Iran is compared with the 50 US states
content: Iran is roughly the same size as Alaska, 2.5 times the size of Texas and covers about one-sixth of the US land area.
